title: Section — Binding Requirements, Compliance & Addenda
description: The verbatim register of binding requirements ('shall' statements), submission/eligibility requirements, evaluation criteria as written, and the addenda list. This is the compliance backbone the rfp-analysis skill reasons over and the basis a bid is checked against. Captured verbatim with provenance — never paraphrased, never judged for compliance here.

mandatory.description: True for 'shall/must', false for 'should/may', as worded. Recorded, not interpreted.

evaluation_criteria.description: Award/evaluation criteria as written (e.g. 'lowest responsive bid', 'best value 60/40 technical/price').

addenda.description: Issued addenda and what they changed (so a downstream tool can confirm all are acknowledged).
